# Test Cases — TEST-34: Progress Bar — Start, Stop & Track Completion

**Source:** JIRA — https://learningythr.atlassian.net/browse/TEST-34
**Generated by:** swayambhu-qa
**Tool:** Playwright
**TMS:** Xray
**Test URL:** https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/

---

## TC-TEST34-01: Page loads with progress bar at 0% and Start button visible

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-01 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Type** | Functional — Happy Path |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Browser is open and navigated to https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Page has fully loaded

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to the progress bar page | https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/ | Page loads with title visible |
| 2 | Observe the progress bar element | — | Progress bar is visible and shows 0% |
| 3 | Observe the percentage label | — | Label reads "0%" |
| 4 | Observe the control button | — | A "Start" button is visible |
| 5 | Verify Stop button is absent at load | — | No "Stop" button is visible on the page |

---

## TC-TEST34-02: Clicking Start begins animation and reveals Stop button

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-02 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Type** | Functional — Happy Path |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Progress bar is at 0%

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Click the "Start" button | — | Progress bar begins filling (width increases) |
| 2 | Wait 500ms and observe bar width | — | Bar width is greater than 0% |
| 3 | Observe the percentage label after 500ms | — | Label shows a value > 0% |
| 4 | Observe available buttons while bar is filling | — | "Stop" button is now visible |
| 5 | Verify progress continues incrementing | — | Percentage increases over time |

---

## TC-TEST34-03: Progress bar reaches 100% and shows completion state

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-03 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Type** | Functional — Happy Path |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Progress bar is at 0% and ready to start

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Click the "Start" button | — | Progress bar begins animation |
| 2 | Wait for bar to reach 100% (up to 30 seconds) | — | Percentage label shows "100%" |
| 3 | Observe bar visual state at 100% | — | Bar is fully filled AND shows a completion state (colour change or completion text) |
| 4 | Observe available buttons after completion | — | "Start" button is visible again (to allow restart) |

---

## TC-TEST34-04: Stop halts progress and Start resumes from same percentage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-04 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Type** | Functional — Happy Path |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Progress bar is at 0%

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Click the "Start" button | — | Progress bar begins filling |
| 2 | Wait for bar to pass 20% | — | Percentage label shows value > 20% |
| 3 | Record the current percentage value | — | Percentage value is captured (e.g. "37%") |
| 4 | Click the "Stop" button | — | Progress bar animation halts immediately |
| 5 | Wait 1000ms and observe the bar | — | Percentage stays unchanged (still "37%") — bar is frozen |
| 6 | Click the "Start" button again | — | Progress bar resumes from 37% (not from 0%) |
| 7 | Verify bar continues incrementing from paused value | — | Percentage increases beyond 37% |

---

## TC-TEST34-05: After completion, Start resets bar to 0% and restarts animation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-05 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Type** | Functional — Happy Path |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Progress bar has already reached 100% (completion state)

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to page and click "Start", wait until 100% | — | Bar shows 100% / completion state |
| 2 | Click the "Start" button | — | Bar resets to 0% |
| 3 | Observe bar immediately after clicking Start | — | Bar is at 0% or immediately begins filling from 0 |
| 4 | Wait 500ms | — | Bar is filling again from near 0% (not stuck at 100%) |

---

## TC-TEST34-06: Percentage label stays in sync with bar width

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-06 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Type** | Functional — Edge Case |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Progress bar is at 0%

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Click "Start" | — | Bar begins filling |
| 2 | At ~25%: read label text and bar width | — | Label percentage ≈ bar fill width percentage (within ±2%) |
| 3 | At ~50%: read label text and bar width | — | Label percentage ≈ bar fill width percentage |
| 4 | At ~75%: read label text and bar width | — | Label percentage ≈ bar fill width percentage |
| 5 | Click "Stop" and read both values | — | Both label and bar show identical frozen value |

---

## TC-TEST34-07: Stop at very early stage (0–5%) still halts correctly

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-07 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Type** | Negative / Edge Case |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Click "Start" | — | Animation begins |
| 2 | Immediately click "Stop" (within 200ms) | — | Bar stops at a value between 0% and ~5% |
| 3 | Wait 1000ms | — | Percentage does not increase — bar is frozen |
| 4 | Click "Start" | — | Bar resumes from the early stopped value (not from 0%) |

---

## TC-TEST34-08: Keyboard navigation — Tab to Start and activate with Enter

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-TEST34-08 |
| **Requirement** | TEST-34 — Progress Bar |
| **Priority** | P3 |
| **Type** | Accessibility |
| **Automated** | Yes — Playwright |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] Page is loaded at https://qaplayground.dev/apps/progress-bar/
- [ ] Browser focus is at start of page (no element focused)

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Press Tab key until "Start" button is focused | — | "Start" button receives visible focus outline |
| 2 | Press Enter key | — | Progress bar begins filling (same as mouse click) |
| 3 | Tab to "Stop" button | — | "Stop" button receives focus while bar is animating |
| 4 | Press Enter on "Stop" | — | Progress bar halts at current percentage |
